Warning: To support I2C port clock rates > 200 KHz, the EFB WB_CLK signal should be connected a clock source of at least 3 MHz

MT246 :"c:\users\charl\documents\temp backups\17.03.26\proj500 (humanoid)\fpga\proj500_pdu_fpga\pdu_efb_i2c.v":91:8:91:16|Blackbox EFB is missing a user supplied timing model. This may have a negative effect on timing analysis and optimizations (Quality of Results)
Message.Navigation: Blackbox EFB is missing a user supplied timing model. This may have a negative effect on timing analysis and optimizations (Quality of Results)

Message.Dynamic: Warning: To support I2C port clock rates > 200 KHz, the EFB WB_CLK signal should be connected a clock source of at least 3 MHz
